title: Course
description: A single course in the DIT@EKPA undergraduate programme. One JSON file per course, keyed by its code.

code.description: Natural key, e.g. Κ17, Κ23γ, ΘΠ01, ΕΠ13, ΓΠ07.

category.description: Curriculum bucket the course belongs to.

hours.description: Weekly teaching hours: Θεωρία / Φροντιστήριο / Εργαστήριο.

ects.description: ECTS credits. Fractional values allowed (e.g. free courses from other departments).

semester.description: Semester(s) in which the course is offered (1-8). Most courses have one; a few list two. Absent for free electives, which are not tied to a PPS semester.

term.description: Offering term, used for free electives (ΕΛ) which are listed per term.

department.description: For free electives: the EKPA department that offers the course.

direction.description: CS or CET. Set for direction electives (ΕΥ) and projects; null otherwise.

prerequisites.description: Prerequisite courses. type=required (bold in the PDF) vs recommended (italic).

specialization_roles.description: Per-specialization role. mandatory (Υ) = required to claim that specialization; basic (Β) = core elective of it. Absent key = not part of that specialization.

offered_this_year.description: false when the title carries (ΔΠ) = not offered this academic year. Defaults to true.

instructors.description: Teaching staff, as printed in the per-semester schedule.

description_url.description: Optional link to the external analytical course description.

notes.description: Free text for edge cases or data-entry caveats.
